## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Validation

- [ ] `scripts\run-smoke-tests.ps1`
- [ ] manual check when template or image behavior changed
- [ ] documentation updated if the user-facing workflow changed

## Risks

- template compatibility
- image layout regressions
- direct-chat wrapper regressions

## Notes

Include sanitized examples, extracted outlines, or output screenshots when they materially help review.
